infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to OVR Velocity sensors for real-time velocity tracking during your workouts.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to OVR Velocity sensors.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to record your workout videos for form analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone for voice commands during your workouts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app saves workout videos to your photo library.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow OVR VBT Coach to connect to OVR Velocity sensors
